steps.title: Use the chocolate row
steps.content: The question asks for the fraction of chocolate-colored kittens, so the denominator should be the total number of chocolate-colored kittens.

steps.title: Form the requested fraction
steps.content:
From the chocolate row, $12$ chocolate-colored kittens have deep blue eyes out of $16$ chocolate-colored kittens total:
$$\frac{12}{16}$$
The answer is D.
